mapper.sql:
WHERE 1=1
AND r.review_text LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND r.sentiment = #{sentiment}
AND r.skin_type LIKE '%' || #{skinType} || '%'
mapper.select:
SELECT r.review_id as reviewId , r.product_id as productId , p.product_name as productName , p.brand_name as brandName , r.nickname , r.review_date as reviewDate , r.rating , r.skin_tone as skinTone , r.skin_type as skinType , r.skin_raw as skinRaw , r.satisfaction , r.purchase_option as purchaseOption , r.review_text as reviewText , r.helpful , r.sentiment FROM t_review r JOIN t_product p ON r.product_id = p.product_id
ORDER BY r.review_id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_review r JOIN t_product p ON r.product_id = p.product_id
